text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Hanshin Daishoten, one of the few graded
races that's 3,000 meters long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With two laps to cover, this race will demand
consistency and composure. However...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, um... I've been feelin' kinda antsy... for a
few days now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Not really, but... recently there was this race for
runners in their classic year...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Oguri Cap conquers the G3! This strength of
hers, unfazed even on turf... Just where is it
coming from?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Even in graded races, she lives up to the rumors!
There's no sign she's peaked yet either... Just how
strong will this girl get?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We're roomies, so I like to keep an eye on her. I
always had her down as this laid-back kinda girl...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But sometimes, I don't even recognize her. It's like
she turns into this unstoppable force...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It just kinda gets to me, ya know? When I see her
runnin', I get this fear deep down in my chest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is classic-year runner, one year behind
Tamamo Cross. As such, we've yet to encounter
her in a single race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So why is Tamamo Cross so fixated on her? I don't
have the answer, but...
choice_data_list: Right now, let's focus on our upcoming race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
choice_data_list:
We've got the spring Tenno Sho to prepare for,
right?

We've got the spring Tenno Sho to prepare for,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. Yeah, what am I even talkin' about? I'm
goin' nuts here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri is Oguri, and I'm me! If I go stumblin' before
the big race, it'll all be for nothin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've got 3,000 meters to run! The old me
woulda balked at that number, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I got patience on my side now. And that's thanks
to you and our last two years together. Gotta
store the energy in my legs, then go all out at the
end and nab the win!
